documentation.value: A string literal naming the test case. Must be unique.
Optional decorators: `doctest::test_suite("name")`, `doctest::skip()`, `doctest::timeout(seconds)`, etc.
A string literal naming the subcase.
A boolean expression to check. Decomposed for detailed failure messages.
A boolean expression. Test case stops immediately on failure.
A boolean expression. Reports a warning on failure without failing the test.
Left-hand side value.
Right-hand side value to compare against.
Left-hand side value.
Right-hand side value that `lhs` should not equal.
Left-hand side value (expected to be less).
Right-hand side value (upper bound).
An expression expected to throw an exception.
An expression expected to throw.
The expected exception type (e.g. `std::runtime_error`, `std::out_of_range`).
